SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF NYASHA UMOH IS PRESENT. LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE FOR EDUCATION AND RESEARCH INC. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UMOH, NYASHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE FOR EDUCATION AND  RESERACH INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
